entry.title: DRA: numeric model: mode switching
entry.summary:
### Enhancement Description
- One-line enhancement description (can be used as a release note): _[Numeric parameters](https://github.com/kubernetes/enhancements/issues/4381) provide a framework that enables scheduling to handle claim parameters which follow a certain numeric model. This KEP provides one such model which is complex enough to be used for the initial set of DRA drivers for GPUs._ - Kubernetes Enhancement Proposal: <!-- link to kubernetes/enhancements file; if none yet, link to PR --> - Discussion Link: [Batch WG meeting 20231207](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d6_wjph5Pp8&list=PL69nYSiGNLP1U1eU1NPyflIGmwzcXPsev&index=2), [DRA intro and plan in that meeting](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XNkTobkyz-MyXhidhTp5RfbMsM-uRCWDoflUMqNcYTk/edit#heading=h.zelykp9y63ra) - Primary contact (assignee): @pohly - Responsible SIGs: SIG Node - Enhancement target (which target equals to which milestone): - Alpha release target (x.y): 1.30 - Beta release target (x.y): - Stable release target (x.y): - [ ] Alpha - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update PR(s):
<!-- Uncomment these as you prepare the enhancement for the next stage - [ ] Beta - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update(s): - [ ] Stable - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update(s): -->
/sig node /wg batch

entry.title: DRA: numeric model: simple counter
entry.summary:
### Enhancement Description
- One-line enhancement description (can be used as a release note): _[Numeric parameters](https://github.com/kubernetes/enhancements/issues/4381) provide a framework that enables scheduling to handle claim parameters which follow a certain numeric model. This KEP provides one such model with a single integer counter, similar to an extended resource._ - Kubernetes Enhancement Proposal: <!-- link to kubernetes/enhancements file; if none yet, link to PR --> - Discussion Link: [Batch WG meeting 20231207](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d6_wjph5Pp8&list=PL69nYSiGNLP1U1eU1NPyflIGmwzcXPsev&index=2), [DRA intro and plan in that meeting](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XNkTobkyz-MyXhidhTp5RfbMsM-uRCWDoflUMqNcYTk/edit#heading=h.zelykp9y63ra) - Primary contact (assignee): @pohly - Responsible SIGs: SIG Node - Enhancement target (which target equals to which milestone): - Alpha release target (x.y): 1.30 - Beta release target (x.y): - Stable release target (x.y): - [ ] Alpha - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update PR(s):
<!-- Uncomment these as you prepare the enhancement for the next stage - [ ] Beta - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update(s): - [ ] Stable - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update(s): -->
/sig node /wg batch

entry.title: DRA: numeric parameters
entry.summary:
### Enhancement Description
- One-line enhancement description (can be used as a release note): _The original dynamic resource allocation (DRA) uses claim and class parameters that are opaque to Kubernetes. With numeric parameters, kube-scheduler and Cluster Autoscaler can handle respectively simulate claim allocation themselves without relying on a third-party driver._ - Kubernetes Enhancement Proposal: <!-- link to kubernetes/enhancements file; if none yet, link to PR --> - Discussion Link: [Batch WG meeting 20231207](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d6_wjph5Pp8&list=PL69nYSiGNLP1U1eU1NPyflIGmwzcXPsev&index=2), [DRA intro and plan in that meeting](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XNkTobkyz-MyXhidhTp5RfbMsM-uRCWDoflUMqNcYTk/edit#heading=h.zelykp9y63ra) - Primary contact (assignee): @pohly - Responsible SIGs: SIG Node - Enhancement target (which target equals to which milestone): - Alpha release target (x.y): 1.30 - Beta release target (x.y): - Stable release target (x.y): - [ ] Alpha - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update PR(s):
<!-- Uncomment these as you prepare the enhancement for the next stage - [ ] Beta - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update(s): - [ ] Stable - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update(s): -->

entry.title: Allow special characters environment variable
entry.summary:
### Enhancement Description
- One-line enhancement description (can be used as a release note): Allow special characters in environment variables - Kubernetes Enhancement Proposal: https://github.com/kubernetes/enhancements/pull/4373 - Discussion Link: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/53201 - Primary contact (assignee): @HirazawaUi - Responsible SIGs: - Enhancement target (which target equals to which milestone): - Alpha release target (x.y): 1.30 - Beta release target (x.y): - Stable release target (x.y): - [ ] Alpha - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update PR(s):

_Please keep this description up to date. This will help the Enhancement Team to track the evolution of the enhancement efficiently._

entry.title: Job API managed-by label
entry.summary:
### Enhancement Description
- One-line enhancement description: Support managed-by label for Jobs - Kubernetes Enhancement Proposal: [KEP-4368: Job API managed-by label](https://github.com/kubernetes/enhancements/pull/4370) - Discussion Link: [Job API proposal for MultiKueue](https://docs.google.com/document/d/14Au6b2J_AICyr9u8mtjDY8s9XcaZcEOCF7twG6PbWtU) and [sig-apps meeting Nov 27,2023](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1LZLBGW2wRDwAfdBNHJjFfk9CFoyZPcIYGWU7R1PQ3ng/) - Primary contact (assignee): @mimowo - Responsible SIGs: apps - Enhancement target (which target equals to which milestone): - Alpha release target (x.y): - Beta release target (x.y): 1.30 - Stable release target (x.y): <!-- - [ ] Alpha - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update PR(s): -->
- [ ] Beta - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update(s): <!-- - [ ] Stable - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update(s): --> _Please keep this description up to date. This will help the Enhancement Team to track the evolution of the enhancement efficiently._

entry.title: Coordinated Leader Election
entry.summary:
### Enhancement Description
- One-line enhancement description (can be used as a release note): A "coordinated" component leader election mechanism that is safer for upgrades and rollbacks. - Kubernetes Enhancement Proposal: https://github.com/kubernetes/enhancements/pull/4356 - Discussion Link: <!-- link to SIG mailing list thread, meeting, or recording where the Enhancement was discussed before KEP creation --> - Primary contact (assignee): @jpbetz - Responsible SIGs: sig-apimachinery - Enhancement target (which target equals to which milestone): - Alpha release target (x.y): 1.30 - Beta release target (x.y): - Stable release target (x.y): - [ ] Alpha - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update PR(s):
<!-- Uncomment these as you prepare the enhancement for the next stage - [ ] Beta - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update(s): - [ ] Stable - [ ] KEP (`k/enhancements`) update PR(s): - [ ] Code (`k/k`) update PR(s): - [ ] Docs (`k/website`) update(s): -->
_Please keep this description up to date. This will help the Enhancement Team to track the evolution of the enhancement efficiently._
